name: Adventure Miner
author: Poki
description: Adventure Miner is an exploration game where you dig up beautiful ores, stack them high on your back, and sell them for shiny gold! Build giant stacks as you mine, but keep your eyes open! Secret ruins may appear along the way, giving you awesome buffs and rewards. Use your gold to upgrade your base and power up your pickaxe so you can dig even deeper. Ready to mine, stack, and strike it rich? How to play Adventure Miner? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created Adventure Miner? Adventure Miner is created by izyplay. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Adventure Miner for free? You can play Adventure Miner for free on Poki. Can I play Adventure Miner on mobile devices and desktop? Adventure Miner can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
